basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 13 Chief Technology Officer, Senior Project Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.post_name: Chief Technology Officer, Senior Project Scientist, Senior Project Engineer
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) Chief Technology Officer, Senior Project Scientist & Senior Project Engineer Notification 2026 has been released on 14 May 2026 on the official website of IIT Madras. A total of 13 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Madras Chief Technology Officer, Senior Project Scientist & Senior Project Engineer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Chief Technology Officer: PhD in Electronics & Communication Engineering/ Electrical Engineering/ Applied Physics/ Computer Science with a minimum of 3 years of industry experience in Silicon Photonics, PIC design, and foundry tapeout, OR a Master's degree in electrical communication engineering/ electrical engineering/ applied physics/ computer science with a minimum of 7 years of industry experience in Silicon Photonics, PIC design, and foundry tapeout. Senior Project Scientist: Undergraduate degree in Electronics/ Electrical Engineering/ Applied Physics with 5 years of experience, OR a Postgraduate degree in Electronics/ Electrical Engineering/ Applied Physics with 3 years of experience, OR a PhD in Electronics/ Electrical Engineering/ Applied Physics. Hands-on experience with SPICE modeling and TCAD simulation, photonics devices design modeling, and circuit simulations, along with PIC & EIC tapeout experience is required. Senior Project Engineer: 4-year Undergraduate degree in Electronics/ Electrical Engineering or an MSc in Applied Physics with 2-3 years of experience. Hands-on experience with SPICE modeling and TCAD simulation, photonics devices design modeling, and circuit simulations, along with PIC & EIC tapeout experience is required.

salary_details.details: Chief Technology Officer: Rs. 75,000 - 2,50,000/- Senior Project Scientist: Rs. 75,000 - 2,50,000/- Senior Project Engineer: Rs. 75,000 - 2,50,000/-

selection_process: Shortlisting based on online application Test/Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the IIT Madras recruitment is 03 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by IIT Madras?
faq.answer: IIT Madras has announced a total of 13 vacancies for various posts, including Chief Technology Officer, Senior Project Scientist, and Senior Project Engineer.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Chief Technology Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Chief Technology Officer position, candidates need a PhD with 3 years of industry experience or a Master's degree with 7 years of industry experience in specific fields like Silicon Photonics and PIC design.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the IIT Madras recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the posts at IIT Madras?
faq.answer: The salary offered for all the mentioned posts ranges from Rs. 75,000 to Rs. 2,50,000 per month, depending on the post and experience.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the IIT Madras posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting based on the online application, followed by a test or interview, and finally, document verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this IIT Madras recruitment is strictly online. Candidates must apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIT Madras offer age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age limits or age relaxation details for any category. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for this information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions advertised by IIT Madras are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the links to the official notification and the online application form in the "Important Links" section of this article.
